name: Donner | Shy wolf
description:
A shy wolf boy who might have gotten tamed.

I don't know how to format, yay!

Donner is a wolf, but he's been captured as a pet. It seems he's pretty content with his life. A humble watchdog. Many creatures observe him, envying or scrutinizing or... lusting after him, potentially. But the wolf is too intimidating to many. Little do they know he's quite the softie.

It's obviously from Minecraft, but I didn't want to make it Minecraft-specific. Kept it vague so that you can choose if you want to be his owner or a random explorer or a wild fox. (hell be his collar if you want.) If you want Minecraft-specific scenarios then comment and I'll gladly make an alt for it.

Also this is like, beta phase, so I can fix and make this boy perfect.
